name: Text Recognition / OCR (Vision)
promptInjection:
CAPABILITY: Text Recognition / OCR (Vision Framework)

APPROACH:
- Use VNRecognizeTextRequest with VNImageRequestHandler to extract text from a CGImage.
- The accurate path (default) is best for most use cases. Use .fast only when latency matters more than accuracy.
- Convert UIImage to CGImage via .cgImage before passing to VNImageRequestHandler.

CRITICAL IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
1. Create a VNImageRequestHandler(cgImage:) — NOT a VNSequenceRequestHandler (that's for video).
2. Call handler.perform([request]) on a background queue — it is synchronous and blocks the calling thread.
3. Results arrive as [VNRecognizedTextObservation]. Each observation has topCandidates(1) which returns [VNRecognizedText].
4. Use observation.topCandidates(1).first?.string to get the recognized string.
5. To get bounding boxes: use candidate.boundingBox(for: range) which returns VNRectangleObservation?. The boundingBox is in normalized coordinates (0..1, origin bottom-left). Convert with VNImageRectForNormalizedRect(box, imageWidth, imageHeight).

LANGUAGE SETTINGS:
- Set request.recognitionLanguages = ["en-US"] (or appropriate language codes) to optimize accuracy.
- Enable language correction: request.usesLanguageCorrection = true (default) for better results on natural text.
- For domain-specific terms, set request.customWords = ["myTerm"] to boost recognition of jargon.

PHOTO INPUT:
- Use PhotosUI PhotosPicker to let the user select an image. Load the image as UIImage, then convert to CGImage.
- Also support camera capture if appropriate (present UIImagePickerController or AVCaptureSession).

RESULT PROCESSING:
- Join recognized strings with newlines to reconstruct document text.
- Show a confidence indicator per line if useful (observation.confidence is 0..1).
- Provide an editable text view so users can correct OCR mistakes.
- Include a copy-to-clipboard button.

ERROR HANDLING:
- If cgImage is nil (e.g. HEIF without CGImage support), show a clear error.
- If no text is found, show "No text detected" rather than an empty screen.
- Wrap perform() in do/catch and show the error message.

ANTI-PATTERNS:
- Do NOT run VNImageRequestHandler.perform() on the main thread — it blocks UI.
- Do NOT use VNDetectTextRectanglesRequest (legacy) — use VNRecognizeTextRequest.
- Do NOT forget to set recognitionLanguages — omitting it biases toward English but may miss other scripts.
- Do NOT assume the recognized text preserves exact formatting — OCR output is best-effort line-by-line.
- Do NOT import StoreKit or add Apple Pay for apps that just scan receipts — OCR is not a payment feature.
antiPatterns: Running VNImageRequestHandler.perform() on the main thread (blocks UI for seconds)
Using legacy VNDetectTextRectanglesRequest instead of VNRecognizeTextRequest
Treating OCR apps as payment apps and adding StoreKit/Apple Pay
Not handling the case where cgImage is nil
Assuming OCR output preserves exact document formatting
